description: User message expresses satisfaction, gratitude, or delight — the interaction has gone well and the user is signaling a positive outcome. Lowest-urgency routing but high value for feedback loops, NPS triggers, and upsell/referral opportunities. Recommended downstream action: confirm the resolution warmly, invite feedback or review, consider proactive upsell or referral prompt; flag for CSAT/NPS survey trigger.
